situational_context: Running comeback 70 days in (since May 3), 14 runs completed. Longest run 7.5 km (Run #12, June 21). Last run: Run #14, 6.0 km on July 5 — 7-day gap due to Paris heatwave RED alert (3rd wave since May, July 6-13) + Saint-Malo weekend trip. ACWR normalized from 1.35 (June 14) to 0.85 — entering detraining territory; must resume running mid-week. HRV stable at 35 ms (BALANCED), recovered from UNBALANCED period in late June. VO2max running 41.5 (up from 40.6). Weight: 103.67 kg (3-week-old reading, June 21). Post-heatwave modifier active (~10 days from heatwave end ~July 14): all heat bands lowered 3°C. Paris cooling from 36°C to 28°C by July 18 — indoor sessions early week, outdoor possible by weekend. Vitamin D retest overdue (was due July 2026). Baby Léonie 18 months — normal sleep disruption.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Récupération indoor optionnelle — home trainer Z1 ou mobilité

recommendations.text: Resume running mid-week (Run #15, indoor treadmill Wednesday July 15) to prevent ACWR from sliding below 0.80 detraining threshold. 7-day gap is the longest since comeback began May 3. Anchor to demonstrated tolerance: 5 km / 40-45 min Z2 (FC ≤145 bpm). Indoor due to post-heatwave heat.
recommendations.measurable: Run #15 executed by July 15; ACWR >= 0.90 by end of week

recommendations.text: Schedule Vitamin D blood panel retest. Supplementation active since December 2025, last test 27 ng/mL (insufficient, target >=40 ng/mL). 7 months of supplementation should show improvement. GP seed: 'Je prends de la vitamine D depuis décembre, je voudrais vérifier le taux actuel.'
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed before end of July 2026

recommendations.text: Restore Withings weighing cadence — last reading June 21 (3 weeks ago, 103.67 kg). Without weight data, body composition trend is blind. The weekly pesée event is on Sunday mornings.
recommendations.measurable: Withings weight reading logged by July 13

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR drops below 0.80 (detraining) or exceeds 1.30 after resuming running
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 0.85 — lower edge of safe zone. 7-day gap risks further decline. Must resume activity.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms or fails to recover toward 37+ ms
markers_to_watch.reason: Stable at 35 ms (BALANCED). Monitor for impact of resuming running after gap + post-heatwave stress.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Monitor body battery, sleep quality, RHR for 10 days post-heatwave end (~until July 24)
markers_to_watch.reason: 3rd heatwave since May with RED alert. Even after temps drop, cumulative heat stress may linger.
